headline: How The Arch Capital Group (ACGL) Story Is Shifting With Fresh Targets And Buybacks
summary: Arch Capital Group is back in focus as one large global bank has set a new price target of US$114, placing it above several other recent targets on the stock. Those incremental target moves tie directly to Street commentary that balances confidence in the business with ongoing questions about upside potential and technology related risks across the insurance value chain. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets feed into the broader analyst narrative and what that can mean for...
